Tests for ANCS filtering, notifications, utility functions, Nexmo SMS, notification storage, and build script.


## Files
- **[test_ancs_filtering.c](test_ancs_filtering.c.md)**: Tests for ANCS filtering functionality in Pebble firmware, including notification preference handling.
- **[test_ancs_notifications.c](test_ancs_notifications.c.md)**: Tests for handling ANCS notifications, including phone call messages and removals, in Pebble firmware.
- **[test_ancs_notifications_util.c](test_ancs_notifications_util.c.md)**: Tests for ANCS notification utility functions, including timestamp parsing and attribute management.
- **[test_nexmo.c](test_nexmo.c.md)**: Tests for Nexmo reauthentication SMS handling in the Pebble firmware notification service.
- **[test_notification_storage.c](test_notification_storage.c.md)**: Tests for notification storage functionality, including storing, retrieving, removing, and handling notifications.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for testing notification services in the Pebble firmware using the clar framework.
